original_query: select 100.00 * sum(case when p_type like 'PROMO%' then l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) else 0 end) / sum(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) as promo_revenue from lineitem, part where l_partkey = p_partkey and l_shipdate >= date '1997-03-01' and l_shipdate < date '1997-03-01' + interval '1' month;
rewritten_query:
SELECT 
    100.00 * SUM(CASE WHEN p_type LIKE 'PROMO%' THEN calc ELSE 0 END) / SUM(calc) AS promo_revenue
FROM (
    SELECT 
        l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount) AS calc,
        p.p_type
    FROM 
        lineitem l
        INNER JOIN part p ON l.l_partkey = p.p_partkey
    WHERE 
        l.l_shipdate >= DATE '1997-03-01'
        AND l.l_shipdate < DATE '1997-04-01'
) sub;

rewrite_suggestion.produced_suggestion: Precompute the calculation l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) once in a subquery to avoid redundant calculations in the aggregation functions
Replace implicit join syntax (comma-separated tables) with explicit INNER JOIN for better readability and maintainability
